## Summary

Describe the QA artifact, documentation, test case, data, SQL, or defect update.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Test case update
- [ ] SQL validation update
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Synthetic data update
- [ ] Defect template or workflow update
- [ ] Regression coverage update

## QA Review Checklist

- [ ] Requirements traceability updated
- [ ] Synthetic data only
- [ ] No PHI or sensitive identifiers included
- [ ] SQL or XML examples reviewed for clarity
- [ ] Mermaid diagrams render in GitHub
- [ ] Links checked
- [ ] Human-readable explanation included

## Evidence

Add links to relevant files, screenshots, query results, or test summaries.
